summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 馬爾他提出涵蓋 DAO 的 DeFi 規範，旨在符合 MiCA 時代的框架，顯示出對加密金融未來的重視。
2. 比特幣脫離科技股的討論升溫，市場預測 6 萬美元可能成為下一個目標。
3. 美國監管機構推動穩定幣發行者需遵循用戶身份要求，這可能會影響市場流動性。
4. 加密貨幣市場整體走勢疲軟，主要幣種如比特幣和以太坊均出現下跌。
5. 以太坊基金會持續流失人事，可能影響其未來發展。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場整體氛圍偏向疲弱，主要幣種均出現不同程度的下滑。比特幣目前報價 $62747，下降幅度達 2.38%。以太坊價格為 $1702.74，下降 2.28%。市場對於未來的預期不明，導致資金流出，整體市值受到壓力。部分小幣如 SOL 雖然仍在多頭區間，但整體市場情緒仍偏向悲觀。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據最新技術指標，比特幣和以太坊的 RSI 分別為 33.52 和 38.31，均顯示出超賣狀態，可能預示短期內有反彈的機會。然而，均線訊號顯示仍為空頭趨勢，近期可能仍會面臨壓力。SOL 的 RSI 雖然相對較高，顯示出多頭信號，但考慮到整體市場的走勢，其表現仍需謹慎觀察。

## 😱 市場情緒
恐懼貪婪指數目前為 15，顯示出市場處於極度恐懼狀態。這通常意味著投資者對市場前景持悲觀態度，可能導致更多的拋售壓力。社群中的情緒普遍不佳，許多投資者對於當前價格表現感到失望，市場信心受到影響。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
市場目前面臨多重風險，包括監管政策的不確定性、美聯儲的鷹派立場以及市場情緒的低迷。投資者需對市場變化保持警惕，特別是在當前恐懼情緒濃厚的背景下，應謹慎操作並考慮資金管理策略。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
1. 注意美國監管機構對穩定幣的進一步政策動向，這可能會影響整體市場流動性。
2. 關注比特幣和以太坊的價格走勢，特別是能否突破當前的技術阻力位。
3. 觀察以太坊基金會的人事變動是否會對其生態系統造成長期影響。

news.title: Malta proposes DeFi rulebook covering DAOs under MiCA-era framework
news.summary: The Maltese regulator is seeking industry feedback on a legal framework for software-governed organizations, arguing that many DeFi projects are not fully decentralized.
news.title_zh: 馬爾他提出涵蓋 DAO 的 DeFi 規範，符合 MiCA 時代框架
news.summary_zh: 馬爾他政府提出新的 DeFi 規範，旨在規範去中心化自治組織（DAO）以符合 MiCA 法規要求。

news.title: Bitcoin decouples from tech stocks: Is $60K BTC’s next stop?
news.summary: Bitcoin’s slump accelerated as capital rotated further into the AI sector, raising the odds of a BTC price drop below $60,000.
news.title_zh: 比特幣脫離科技股：6萬美元會是比特幣的下一個目標嗎？
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的價格表現與科技股脫鉤，市場分析師預測其可能達到6萬美元的關鍵價位。

news.title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
news.summary: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.
news.title_zh: 愛爾蘭考慮加密貨幣安全措施以應對金融風險
news.summary_zh: 面對潛在的金融風險，愛爾蘭政府正在研究加密貨幣的安全保障措施。

news.title: US regulators push user ID requirements for stablecoin issuers akin to regulated banks
news.summary: The proposed rules by US government agencies suggested that stablecoin issuers be subject to customer identification program requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act, the same as regulated financial firms.
news.title_zh: 美國監管機構推動穩定幣發行者的用戶身份要求，類似於受監管銀行
news.summary_zh: 美國監管機構要求穩定幣發行者遵循用戶身份驗證規定，以提高金融透明度。

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣市場發生了什麼
news.summary_zh: 今日加密貨幣市場動態回顧，涵蓋主要事件和價格變化。

news.title: Strategy’s preferred stock STRC continues to trade under $90 as trading volume jumps
news.summary: Strategy's preferred STRC stock closed again under $90 for the second consecutive day at $88.59, having drifted as low as $82.50.
news.title_zh: 策略偏好的股票 STRC 繼續在90美元以下交易，交易量激增
news.summary_zh: 儘管交易量上升，STRC 股票仍在90美元以下波動，投資者持續關注其表現。

news.title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
news.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.
news.title_zh: 中國 Z.AI 發布 GLM-5.2：一款與 Claude Opus 競爭的模型——使用零 Nvidia 芯片
news.summary_zh: 中國 Z.AI 推出新模型 GLM-5.2，無需 Nvidia 芯片，挑戰現有 AI 模型的市場地位。

news.title: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
news.summary: Image generation company Midjourney is developing a full-body imaging system that combines ultrasound tech with AI smarts.
news.title_zh: Midjourney 從 AI 圖像轉向醫療影像，旨在打造更好的 MRI 替代品
news.summary_zh: Midjourney 將重心轉向醫療影像技術，計劃開發更高效的 MRI 替代方案。

news.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin microtransactions now make up 80% of daily transactions
news.summary: Bitcoin transactions below 0.01 BTC now make up about 80% of all daily transactions, up from about 44% in 2023, CryptoQuant said.
news.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示比特幣微交易現在佔每日交易的80%
news.summary_zh: 根據 CryptoQuant 的數據，比特幣微交易在日常交易中佔據了80%的比重，顯示出市場活躍度。

news.title: Custodia, Vantage propose token that toggles between bank deposits and stablecoins
news.summary: The proposed system aims to connect traditional banking infrastructure with blockchain-based payment networks with banks retaining customer deposits.
news.title_zh: Custodia 和 Vantage 提出一種在銀行存款和穩定幣之間切換的代幣
news.summary_zh: Custodia 和 Vantage 聯手提出新型代幣，允許用戶在銀行存款和穩定幣之間靈活切換。

news.title: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
news.summary: The settlement ensures that convicted Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky is unable to trade in CFTC markets or register with the regulator.
news.title_zh: CFTC 對 Celsius 加密貨幣詐騙者 Alex Mashinsky 採取永久交易禁令
news.summary_zh: 美國商品期貨交易委員會對 Celsius 的創始人 Alex Mashinsky 實施永久交易禁令，因其涉及詐騙行為。

news.title: New Texas power grid allocation framework could lift bitcoin miners turned data center operators
news.summary: The Electric Reliability Council of Texas says data centers account for nearly 90% of the 438 GW of large-load demand in the state.
news.title_zh: 新的德州電網分配框架可能提升比特幣礦工轉型數據中心的運營
news.summary_zh: 德州推出新的電網分配框架，預計將有助於比特幣礦工轉型為數據中心運營商。

news.title: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
news.summary: Quantum computing threatens the blockchain ecosystem, from Bitcoin to Ethereum and beyond, and Algorand has a plan to be prepared.
news.title_zh: Algorand 計劃在 2027 年底前準備應對量子計算威脅
news.summary_zh: Algorand 宣布將在 2027 年底前做好應對量子計算技術帶來的安全挑戰的準備。

news.title: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
news.summary: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.
news.title_zh: 以太坊基金會人事流失持續，聯合主任王曉偉離職
news.summary_zh: 以太坊基金會的聯合主任王曉偉宣布離職，繼續引發人事流動的關注。

news.title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
news.summary: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.
news.title_zh: Wealthsimple 推出由 Kalshi 驅動的預測市場應用程式，專為加拿大投資者
news.summary_zh: Wealthsimple 新推出的應用程式允許加拿大投資者參與基於 Kalshi 的預測市場。

news.title: Sen. Gillibrand’s son is building a perps exchange that wants dual CFTC, SEC oversight: report
news.summary: The American Perpetuals Exchange Corporation raised $30 million at a $300 million valuation, Fortune reported on Thursday.
news.title_zh: 參議員 Gillibrand 的兒子正在建立一個希望獲得 CFTC 和 SEC 雙重監管的期貨交易所
news.summary_zh: Gillibrand 參議員的兒子正在開發一個期貨交易所，計劃同時接受 CFTC 和 SEC 的監管。

news.title: Rep. Steil introduces bill to block lawmakers from placing prediction markets bets on public policy issues
news.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil introduced legislation aimed at preventing lawmakers and their families from profiting from bets on political outcomes.
news.title_zh: 眾議員 Steil 提出法案，阻止立法者在公共政策問題上進行預測市場投注
news.summary_zh: 眾議員 Steil 提出新法案，旨在禁止立法者在公共政策議題上參與預測市場的投注。

news.title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
news.summary: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.

news.summary_zh: 以太坊基金會的領導層再次出現變動，另一位董事宣布離職，顯示出內部不穩定。

news.title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
news.summary: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.
news.title_zh: Perplexity 的 AI 代理現在擁有能夠從自身錯誤中學習的智慧
news.summary_zh: Perplexity 的 AI 代理已經具備從錯誤中學習的能力，提升其智能和適應性。

news.title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
news.summary: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.

news.summary_zh: Bitwise 報告指出，比特幣目前相對於 AI 股票的折扣較深，但仍面臨美聯儲的鷹派風險。

news.title: CFTC enters settlement with former Celsius CEO, imposes a permanent trading ban
news.summary: The CFTC said it has settled its case against former Celsius CEO Alexander Mashinsky, who is currently serving a 12-year prison sentence.
news.title_zh: CFTC 與前 Celsius CEO 達成和解，實施永久交易禁令
news.summary_zh: 美國商品期貨交易委員會對前 Celsius CEO 施加永久交易禁令，結束了相關的法律糾紛。

news.title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
news.title_zh: 前 Celsius CEO Mashinsky 在與監管機構的最終解決中獲得美國 CFTC 禁令
news.summary_zh: Mashinsky 因違規行為獲得 CFTC 禁令，標誌著與監管機構的最終和解。

news.title: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
news.summary: As the MiCA grace period closes, only a fraction of registered firms hold full licenses, setting up the prospect of a wave of consolidation.
news.title_zh: 隨著 MiCA 過渡期結束，歐洲加密公司面臨壓力
news.summary_zh: 歐洲的加密公司在 MiCA 法規過渡期結束前面臨日益嚴峻的挑戰。

news.summary: The crypto miner has signed a landmark three-year GPU contract with Bell Canada and Cohere—as Canada races to build AI systems it actually owns.
news.title_zh: HIVE 股票飆升，因比特幣礦工獲得 2.2 億美元 AI 基礎設施合約

news.title: Hyperliquid poised to become more than an exchange and drive HYPE higher, Hyperion CEO says
news.summary: Hyperion CEO argued investors are still underestimating the decentralized exchange's transformation into a broader blockchain ecosystem.
news.title_zh: Hyperliquid 預計將超越交易所，推動 HYPE 上升，Hyperion CEO 表示
news.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 的 CEO 預測其平台將不僅限於交易，還將提升 HYPE 的影響力。

news.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin mining economics have ‘worsened’ as BTC trades below production cost
news.summary: JPMorgan's current estimated production cost of bitcoin is about $78,000, while bitcoin is currently trading around $62,500.
news.title_zh: 摩根大通表示比特幣礦業經濟惡化，BTC 價格低於生產成本
news.summary_zh: 摩根大通指出，比特幣礦業的經濟狀況惡化，導致 BTC 價格低於生產成本。

news.title: Kentucky Sues Kalshi, Polymarket as Prediction Market Legal Battle Swells
news.summary: Kentucky accused America’s top prediction market platforms of running illegal sports betting operations, joining a growing stack of states.
news.title_zh: 肯塔基州起訴 Kalshi 和 Polymarket，預測市場法律戰升級
news.summary_zh: 肯塔基州對兩家預測市場公司提起訴訟，法律糾紛進一步升級。

news.title: Jefferies expects IREN’s AI cloud business to outpace data center leasing, sees 30% upside
news.summary: Jefferies estimates that only about 10% of IREN's roughly 6 gigawatt global power portfolio is being utilized.
news.title_zh: Jefferies 預期 IREN 的 AI 雲業務將超越數據中心租賃，預測 30% 上漲空間
news.summary_zh: Jefferies 分析師看好 IREN 的 AI 雲業務，預測其增長潛力將超過數據中心租賃。

news.title: Why Bitcoin Titan Strategy's STRC Is Falling to New Lows
news.summary: Strategy’s flagship preferred stock is facing pressure, but analysts say that's not yet an existential threat for the Bitcoin treasury giant.

news.summary_zh: 比特幣巨頭策略的 STRC 價格持續下滑，市場對其前景感到擔憂。

news.title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
news.summary: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.
news.title_zh: HIVE 與 Bell 和 Cohere 簽署 2.2 億美元 AI 基礎設施合約

news.title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
news.summary: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

news.summary_zh: CME集團對CFTC提起訴訟，指控該機構在加密貨幣永續期貨方面突然改變政策。

news.title: CME Group sues CFTC over perpetual futures in US, accusing the agency of ‘suddenly’ changing course
news.summary: The CME Group is officially taking the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to court over allowing perpetual futures to trade in the U.S.

news.summary_zh: CME集團指控CFTC在永續期貨的監管上出現不一致，並提起法律訴訟。

news.summary: Prediction market traders don't see Bitcoin or Ethereum making their next big moves to higher price targets.

news.summary_zh: 比特幣礦工面臨資金需求，以支持其在人工智慧領域的發展，IRN的缺口尤為明顯。

news.summary: Everyday investors that own Strategy’s STRC have been drawn to double-digit yields, but the preferred stock’s volatility has shaken some.

news.title_zh: 以太坊基金會失去另一位關鍵領導者，聯合執行董事王小偉辭職

news.summary: Bitdeer, BitFuFu, Canaan and CleanSpark posted May bitcoin production updates, with combined output of 1,859 BTC and diverging strategies.

news.summary_zh: 多家比特幣礦工在5月的產量表現不一，AI建設對哈希率增長造成影響。

news.title: Jerome Powell Supports Fed's New Stablecoin Policies—But Chair Kevin Warsh Abstains
news.summary: The proposed rulemaking establishes how U.S. crypto companies will have to screen stablecoin customers after the passage of the GENIUS Act.
news.title_zh: 傑羅姆·鮑威爾支持美聯儲的新穩定幣政策—但主席凱文·華爾什選擇棄權
news.summary_zh: 美聯儲主席鮑威爾支持新穩定幣政策，但華爾什對此持保留態度，選擇棄權。

news.title: The DAO hack at 10: From $50 million exploit to a $130 million Ethereum security fund
news.summary: Ten years ago, an attacker drained roughly 3.6 million ETH from The DAO, helping to spur the creation of the modern crypto security industry.

news.summary_zh: DAO黑客事件十年後，從最初的損失演變為以太坊安全基金的建立，反映出行業的變化。

news.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
news.summary: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

news.title: Ethereum Foundation co-Exec Director and board member Hsiao-Wei Wang steps down
news.summary: Several high-ranking EF leaders have left, including the Protocol cluster leads and former co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak.

news.summary_zh: 以太坊基金會的王小偉宣布辭去共同執行董事及董事會成員職務，未透露具體原因。

news.title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
news.title_zh: 顧問的加密貨幣：交易比特幣周期
news.summary_zh: 專家分析比特幣的市場周期，為顧問提供交易策略和建議。

news.title: Bitcoin to $145K by October? Why this 'crazy accurate' 4chan prediction is sketchy
news.summary: A viral 4chan Bitcoin prediction appears to have nailed past BTC prices, but edited targets and impossible supply claims weaken its $145,000 call.
news.title_zh: 比特幣會在十月漲至145K美元？這個「極準確」的4chan預測存疑
news.summary_zh: 一項來自4chan的預測預測比特幣將在十月達到145K美元，但其準確性受到質疑。

news.title: What happens when ChatGPT becomes the front door to crypto
news.summary: ChatGPT could become crypto’s new onboarding gateway, making Bitcoin and wallets easier to use while creating new trust risks.
news.title_zh: 當ChatGPT成為加密貨幣的前門時會發生什麼
news.summary_zh: 探討ChatGPT如何影響加密貨幣市場，並可能成為用戶進入加密世界的主要入口。

news.title: Federal Reserve rolls out proposing rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
news.summary: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.
news.title_zh: 聯邦儲備局推出提案規定穩定幣發行者必須維持客戶識別計劃
news.summary_zh: 美國聯邦儲備局提出新規，要求穩定幣發行者實施客戶識別計劃以增強透明度。

news.title: Ledn to add Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
news.summary: Ledn’s planned addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.
news.title_zh: Ledn 將Tether Gold納入貸款擔保，擴展比特幣擔保貸款模式
news.summary_zh: 加密貸款平台Ledn宣布將Tether Gold作為貸款擔保，進一步擴展其比特幣擔保貸款業務。

news.title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
news.summary: Kraken launches onchain DEX trading to give customers access to thousands of tokens across the Solana ecosystem.
news.title_zh: Kraken將Solana DEX交易整合進核心應用，計劃支持更多網絡
news.summary_zh: 加密交易所Kraken宣布將Solana去中心化交易所整合至其核心應用，並計劃支持更多區塊鏈網絡。

news.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
news.title_zh: Algorand公布2028年前實現量子抗性路線圖
news.summary_zh: Algorand發布計劃，目標在2028年前實現量子計算的抗性，以增強其區塊鏈安全性。

news.title: Tether’s XAUT gold token added to Ledn lending platform
news.summary: "When XAUT-backed loans go live, you will be able to borrow against your gold the way you already borrow against Bitcoin," Ledn said.
news.title_zh: Tether的XAUT黃金代幣新增至Ledn貸款平台
news.summary_zh: Tether的黃金代幣XAUT已被納入Ledn的貸款平台，為用戶提供更多資產選擇。

news.title: Bitcoin miner HIVE inks $220 million AI GPU deal with Bell, expects $70 million annual revenue
news.summary: HIVE finalized a $220 million sovereign cloud contract to deploy 2,304 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs across Canada by early 2027.
news.title_zh: 比特幣礦工HIVE與Bell簽署2.2億美元AI GPU交易，預計年收入7000萬美元
news.summary_zh: HIVE與Bell達成協議，將投資於AI GPU，預計將帶來可觀的年收入。

news.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Sinks After Hawkish FOMC
news.summary: Bitcoin slid to $64k as rate hike odds soared after Kevin Warsh's first FOMC presser. But was it Warsh or Saylor truly driving the selloff?
news.title_zh: 晨間快訊：加密貨幣因鷹派FOMC而下跌
news.summary_zh: 在鷹派聯邦公開市場委員會的影響下，加密貨幣市場出現下滑。

news.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10% while index declines
news.title_zh: CoinDesk 20表現更新：Stellar (XLM)上漲10%，指數下跌
news.summary_zh: 儘管CoinDesk 20指數整體下滑，Stellar (XLM)卻逆勢上漲10%。

news.title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
news.title_zh: Alchemy的AI驅動身份和支付服務獲得Visa網絡接入
news.summary_zh: Alchemy的創新服務現在可以使用Visa網絡，提升支付便利性。

news.title: Alchemy unveils Visa-powered virtual payment card for AI agents
news.summary: AgentCard will default to Visa-issued tokens, but will support crypto and agent-native payment protocols when available.
news.title_zh: Alchemy推出Visa支持的AI代理虛擬支付卡
news.summary_zh: Alchemy推出新虛擬支付卡，專為AI代理設計，利用Visa的支付系統。

news.title: Capital B shareholders approve up to $120B in financing capacity for Bitcoin strategy
news.summary: Capital B shareholders approved up to $120 billion in financing capacity, including equity and credit instruments, to support the company's Bitcoin accumulation strategy.
news.title_zh: Capital B股東批准高達1200億美元的比特幣策略融資能力
news.summary_zh: Capital B的股東同意大規模融資，以支持其比特幣投資策略。

news.title: Ireland Tightens Crypto Safeguards in New Financial Crime Action Plan
news.summary: A new National Risk Assessment names crypto-asset misuse among Ireland's top threats, as a 30-point plan tightens checks on crypto funds.
news.title_zh: 愛爾蘭在新金融犯罪行動計劃中收緊加密貨幣保障措施
news.summary_zh: 愛爾蘭政府加強對加密貨幣的監管，以打擊金融犯罪。

news.title: Bitcoin slips below $64,000 as hawkish Fed overshadows signs of onchain repair
news.summary: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as BTC ETFs post an $82.2 million net outflow, and Glassnode said improving liquidity may be forming a floor.
news.title_zh: 比特幣跌破64,000美元，鷹派美聯儲壓過鏈上修復跡象
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格因美聯儲的鷹派立場而下滑，忽視了市場的修復信號。

news.title: Hive shares jumps 10% on $220m Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal
news.title_zh: Hive股價因2.2億美元的加拿大主權AI基礎設施交易上漲10%
news.summary_zh: Hive的股價因與加拿大政府的AI基礎設施交易而大幅上漲。

news.title: Stablecoin compliance startup Range raises $8.3 million from fintech and crypto VCs
news.summary: "Stablecoins and fiat are converging, and finance teams need one platform to run both safely and at scale," Range CEO Andres Monteoliva said.
news.title_zh: 穩定幣合規初創公司Range從金融科技和加密風投中籌集830萬美元
news.summary_zh: Range成功籌集830萬美元，將加強其穩定幣合規服務。

news.title: The great rotation: Investors desert the Magnificent 7, crypto for AI bottlenecks
news.title_zh: 大轉變：投資者拋棄七大科技股及加密貨幣，轉向人工智慧瓶頸
news.summary_zh: 投資者因人工智慧的潛力而放棄了七大科技股和加密貨幣，顯示出市場的轉變。

news.title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
news.summary: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.
news.title_zh: 七國集團呼籲對北韓的加密盜竊和網絡犯罪採取聯合行動
news.summary_zh: G7國家一致要求加強合作，打擊北韓的加密貨幣盜竊和網絡犯罪行為。

news.title: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
news.summary: Outgoing CME chief Terry Duffy says perpetual futures are actually swaps under Dodd-Frank, and that the exchange will file suit Thursday.
news.title_zh: CME將起訴CFTC，因比特幣永續期貨批准問題：首席執行官
news.summary_zh: CME的首席執行官表示，將對CFTC提起訴訟，挑戰比特幣永續期貨的批准決定。

news.title: Bitcoin's nemesis, the Dollar Index, is on the verge of a major breakout
news.title_zh: 比特幣的死敵，美元指數即將突破重要關口
news.summary_zh: 美元指數接近關鍵突破，可能對比特幣市場造成重大影響。

news.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
news.title_zh: Aster因激進的回購和銷毀升幅超過10%，但漲幅短暫
news.summary_zh: Aster因回購計劃而短暫上漲超過10%，但隨後漲幅迅速回落。

news.title: Crypto market positioning is 'defensive and thin' after Fed, Marex  analysts say
news.title_zh: 分析師表示，聯準會後加密市場定位為「防禦性且稀薄」
news.summary_zh: 在聯準會的影響下，加密市場的投資者情緒變得更加謹慎和防禦。

news.title: Malta's financial regulator explores bringing parts of DeFi under MiCA's orbit
news.title_zh: 馬爾他金融監管機構探索將部分DeFi納入MiCA範疇
news.summary_zh: 馬爾他監管機構考慮將去中心化金融（DeFi）的一部分納入新的監管框架。

news.title: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
news.summary: Bitcoin could be absent from the world's top five assets by market cap until 2036, despite an estimate seeing the BTC bear market being nearly 70% complete.
news.title_zh: 比特幣市值反彈需「5-10年」，自2025年中以來下滑10位
news.summary_zh: 比特幣市值的回升預計需要5到10年的時間，因為其排名已經大幅下滑。

news.title: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
news.summary: Security researchers warn that deprecated smart contracts can remain vulnerable long after projects stop maintaining them.
news.title_zh: Aztec在不到一周內遭遇第二次210萬美元的攻擊：SlowMist
news.summary_zh: 安全公司SlowMist報告稱，Aztec在短時間內遭受了第二次重大資金損失。

news.title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
news.summary: BTC slid to around $64,100 after Kevin Warsh's hawkish debut, but analysts argue a $60,000 floor and catalysts could spark a rebound.
news.title_zh: 比特幣在64,000美元附近穩定，分析師關注鷹派聯準會後的支撐位
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格在64,000美元附近穩定，市場分析師正密切關注潛在的支撐位。

news.title: Grayscale applies traditional finance models to AAVE, sees $175 value
news.summary: Grayscale and CoinShares are applying traditional valuation techniques to crypto assets as institutions explore revenue-generating DeFi protocols.
news.title_zh: Grayscale 將傳統金融模型應用於 AAVE，預測價值175美元
news.summary_zh: Grayscale 針對 AAVE 應用傳統金融模型，預測其未來價值可達175美元，顯示出對該加密貨幣的信心。

news.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
news.title_zh: 債券市場對利率發出明確信號，比特幣多頭應注意
news.summary_zh: 債券市場的變化可能影響利率走向，比特幣投資者應密切關注這一信號以調整策略。

news.title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
news.summary: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.
news.title_zh: Ryan Salame 的妻子將面臨因 FTX 資助的國會競選而提出的指控
news.summary_zh: Ryan Salame 的妻子因涉及 FTX 資助的國會選舉而面臨法律指控，案件引發關注。

news.title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
news.summary: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.
news.title_zh: 佛羅里達男子承認推廣18億美元的‘HyperFund’加密詐騙
news.summary_zh: 一名佛羅里達男子承認參與推廣一項價值18億美元的加密貨幣詐騙計劃，案件正在調查中。

news.title: Live markets: price action turns panicky in Saylor's STRC as bitcoin drops below $63,000
news.title_zh: 實時市場：隨著比特幣跌破63,000美元，Saylor 的 STRC 價格行為變得驚慌
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格下滑至63,000美元以下，導致 Saylor 的 STRC 出現恐慌性交易。

news.title: Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par
news.title_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 優先股跌至低於面值的歷史新低
news.summary_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 優先股價格創下歷史新低，低於其面值，顯示市場信心不足。

news.title: Dorsey’s Block says new AI tool handles 15% of code work
news.summary: Builderbot is the “missing layer between AI coding tools and how engineering actually works at scale,” said Brad Axen, head of AI capabilities at Block.
news.title_zh: Dorsey 的 Block 表示新 AI 工具處理15%的代碼工作
news.summary_zh: Dorsey 的 Block 公司推出的新 AI 工具能夠自動化15%的代碼工作，提高開發效率。

news.title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
news.title_zh: XRP 在突破反彈後跌至1.20美元以下，滑落4%
news.summary_zh: XRP 在突破後未能持續上漲，價格下滑4%，跌至1.20美元以下，面臨重要阻力。

news.title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
news.title_zh: Kraken 表示，低於200周平均價購買比特幣歷史上回報超過100%
news.summary_zh: Kraken 指出，歷史數據顯示，低於200周平均價購買比特幣的投資者可獲得超過100%的回報。

news.title: Bitcoin, ether slide after a hawkish Fed, even as Trump's signed Iran deal lifts stocks
news.title_zh: 在鷹派美聯儲影響下，比特幣和以太幣下滑，特朗普簽署的伊朗協議提振股市
news.summary_zh: 儘管特朗普簽署的伊朗協議提振股市，但鷹派美聯儲政策導致比特幣和以太幣價格下跌。

news.title: France to stop certifying products lacking quantum-resistant encryption
news.summary: France’s cybersecurity agency plans to block certification of products without quantum-resistant encryption starting in 2027, with full adoption targeted for 2030.
news.title_zh: 法國將停止認證缺乏量子抗性加密的產品
news.summary_zh: 法國決定停止對未具備量子抗性加密技術的產品進行認證，以應對未來的安全挑戰。

news.title: Next bull run will be slower, less volatile as investors' crypto appetite evolves, Bitwise CIO says
news.title_zh: Bitwise首席投資官表示下一波牛市將較慢且波動性較小
news.summary_zh: 隨著投資者對加密貨幣的需求變化，Bitwise預測未來的牛市將會更加平穩。

news.title: CME chief executive says company plans to sue CFTC after perpetual futures approval
news.title_zh: CME首席執行官表示公司計劃起訴CFTC以獲得永久期貨批准
news.summary_zh: CME計劃對CFTC提起訴訟，挑戰其對永久期貨的批准決定。

news.title: Kentucky sues Kalshi, Polymarket, joining prediction market legal battle
news.summary: Kentucky has sued Polymarket, Kalshi and Kalshi’s partners Coinbase, Robinhood and Webull, over offering sports event contracts in the state.
news.title_zh: 肯塔基州起訴Kalshi和Polymarket，加入預測市場法律戰
news.summary_zh: 肯塔基州對預測市場平台Kalshi和Polymarket提起訴訟，進一步加劇法律爭議。

news.title: Tether winds down gold-backed derivative stablecoin aUSDT
news.summary: Tether is focusing on stronger user demand, deeper liquidity, and broader long-term market opportunity for its leading products.
news.title_zh: Tether逐步停止金本位衍生穩定幣aUSDT
news.summary_zh: Tether宣布將逐步停止其金本位的穩定幣aUSDT，調整其產品策略。

news.title: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow
news.summary: French authorities said that government cybersecurity researchers will stop certifying security products that lack quantum-resistant encryption beginning in 2027.
news.title_zh: 法國將逐步淘汰非量子加密技術以應對比特幣安全問題
news.summary_zh: 面對比特幣安全性問題，法國計劃逐步淘汰不符合量子加密標準的技術。

news.title: Crypto market treads thin ice following Warsh FOMC, Trump Iran comments
news.summary: Markets wobbled after mixed comments from President Trump on the Iran peace deal and Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaling a new direction from the Federal Reserve.
news.title_zh: 加密市場在Warsh FOMC和特朗普伊朗言論後步履維艱
news.summary_zh: 隨著Warsh FOMC會議和特朗普對伊朗的言論，加密市場面臨不確定性和挑戰。

news.title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
news.summary: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.
news.title_zh: 心理學家表示患者在治療中引入AI：調查結果
news.summary_zh: 一項調查顯示，越來越多的患者在心理治療中使用人工智慧技術。
